message:
🐛 Hide grouped channels from listing, fix playing indicator (#100)

- Re-apply filters after failover groups load to remove grouped channels
- Re-apply filters after any failover group mutation (create/delete/remove)
- Use currentChannelId instead of currentUrl to avoid duplicate highlights
- Expose currentChannelId getter on PlayerService
- Playing member gets purple highlight, bold text, and play icon

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
